violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied and ice was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The ice wells and sinks at the bar are lacking an air gap, an air break was observed. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment is to adjust drains so that they meet the requirements for an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
